name: Potato Polenta
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes in a pot of boiling water until tender (about 15-20 minutes). Drain and mash them.
2. Return to low heat and add potato water. Sprinkle cornmeal with your hand while stirring constantly.
3. Gradually add more water, continuing to stir until you reach the desired consistency (about 3 cups total).
4. In a separate skillet, melt butter over medium heat until it begins to brown slightly.
5. Add diced onion to the skillet and cook for a few minutes on low heat.
6. Stir in the mashed potatoes and continue cooking for about 10-15 minutes.
7. Gradually add cheddar cheese while stirring constantly until well combined.
8. Season with pepper to taste.
Notes: This recipe was brought over from Storo, Austria (now Italy) by my grandfather in 1905.
